### Requirements
- [ComfyUI-DaSiWa-Nodes](https://github.com/darksidewalker/ComfyUI-DaSiWa-Nodes)
- [rgthree-comfy](https://github.com/rgthree/rgthree-comfy)

### Usage
- Download your models and files
- Activate optional switches as you like
masterpiece, best quality, amazing quality, very aesthetic, extremely detailed, very detailed, absurdres, newest, highres, score_9, score_8, score_7,

worst quality, low quality, normal quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, artist name, bad anatomy, bad hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, extra limbs, malformed limbs, blurry, lowres, jpeg artifacts, uncanny,
